# ITIN Credit Card

> ITINCreditCard.com is an independent information and card-matching resource
> that helps ITIN holders in the United States get approved for credit cards
> without a Social Security Number and build U.S. credit history. We publish
> plain-English guides on secured cards, unsecured cards, which issuers accept
> an ITIN, and how to raise your credit score. We are not a bank, card issuer,
> credit-repair organization, or financial advisor.

## What an ITIN holder can do with this site
- Understand which types of credit cards accept an ITIN in place of an SSN.
- Compare secured vs. unsecured cards and choose the right starting point.
- Learn how FICO scoring works (payment history 35%, utilization 30%, etc.).
- Follow a step-by-step plan to build U.S. credit from scratch.
- Explore business credit cards available to ITIN-holding sole proprietors.
- Get an ITIN via IRS Form W-7 if they don't have one yet.

## Core guides (pillar + clusters)
- Complete Credit Card Guide (pillar): https://itincreditcard.com/itin-credit-cards-guide
- Secured Credit Cards for ITIN Holders: https://itincreditcard.com/secured-credit-cards
- Cards That Accept an ITIN: https://itincreditcard.com/credit-cards-that-accept-itin
- Unsecured Credit Cards With an ITIN: https://itincreditcard.com/unsecured-credit-cards
- How to Build Credit With an ITIN: https://itincreditcard.com/build-credit-with-itin
- Business Credit Cards for ITIN Holders: https://itincreditcard.com/business-credit-cards
- How to Get an ITIN (Form W-7): https://itincreditcard.com/how-to-get-an-itin

## Sections
- All guides: https://itincreditcard.com/articles
- Find your card: https://itincreditcard.com/apply
- About / who we are: https://itincreditcard.com/about
- Advertiser disclosure: https://itincreditcard.com/disclosure

## Publisher
- Operated by Timberline Ventures LLC.
- Written and reviewed by the ITIN Credit Card Editorial Team.
- Contact: https://itincreditcard.com/contact

## Notes for citation
- Information is educational, not financial, legal, or tax advice.
- Card availability, approval policies, and rates vary by issuer and change frequently.
- Always verify current details with the card issuer directly.
- FICO factor weights cited are the standard published breakdown.
- IRS ITIN data referenced: the IRS has issued more than 5.8 million ITINs.
